docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY MENDEZ, GUADALUPE AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, ROSALIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDEZ, GUADALUPE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---EUNJI AVERILL. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
